summary: node-fsmetrics-data exhibits characteristics of a malicious npm package
details: node-fsmetrics-data@1.0.1 is a low-file-count npm package whose traced contents match patterns consistent with a supply-chain attack. The package name follows a typosquat/lure convention resembling legitimate filesystem/metrics utilities, and the code content triggered malware-output filtering during automated tracing, a signal that co-occurs with operational malware such as credential harvesters, install-time droppers, or exfiltration routines. No legitimate purpose is evident in the shipped files that would justify the flagged content.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
